hero.description: Securely store, dispense, return and track carbide inserts, end mills, drills, taps, tool holders and gauges. Our CNC tool vending machine helps machine shops and manufacturing plants control tool usage, reduce waste, prevent stockouts and manage real-time inventory.

about.subtitle: Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology Co., Ltd.
about.description: Founded in 2015, Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of CNC tool smart cabinets and intelligent storage solutions. We specialize in R&D, production, and sales of smart storage equipment for manufacturing enterprises.
about.missionText: To provide intelligent, efficient, and reliable tool management solutions that help manufacturers reduce costs, improve efficiency, and ensure traceability.
about.visionText: To become the global leader in intelligent storage solutions, empowering smart manufacturing worldwide.
about.certificationsText: We are ISO quality management system certified with 5 major management system certifications. Our products are protected by multiple patents and software copyrights, ensuring the highest quality and innovation.

valueChain.title: How We Deliver Value Through CNC Tool Management
valueChain.step1Desc: Employees can collect tools after authentication. A detailed issuance record is automatically generated once the process is completed.
valueChain.step2Desc: The system monitors the real-time stock of tools in the cabinet. When the inventory reaches the warning threshold, an alarm is triggered.
valueChain.step3Desc: Restockers then replenish the tools, and the inventory is updated synchronously after restocking.
valueChain.closedLoop: This achieves a closed-loop management of 'issuance – recovery – monitoring – restocking', effectively solving the problems of tool issuance and inventory replenishment.
about.timeline.2019.title: Smart Tool Cabinets for CNC
about.timeline.2019.description: Developed smart tool cabinets focused on CNC tool management, helping manufacturing companies manage tool issuing, return, inventory, and traceability more intelligently.
about.timeline.2021.title: Intelligent Material Management
about.timeline.2021.description: Further focused on intelligent material management, with more than 10 product models covering tools, CNC tools, consumables, spare parts, and other management scenarios.
about.timeline.2022.title: Global Export Services
about.timeline.2022.description: Started export services, with products exported to Portugal, Chile, and other countries, providing intelligent material management solutions for overseas customers.
about.hero.description: Founded in 2015, Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology is a leading manufacturer of CNC tool smart cabinets.
about.intro.paragraph1: As a group-operated national high-tech enterprise, we have attained certifications for five management systems, including ISO Quality Management System, and hold dozens of patents and software copyrights.
about.intro.paragraph2: We specialize in developing and manufacturing a full line of intelligent unmanned management cabinets—such as intelligent material cabinets, intelligent tool cabinets, and intelligent storage cabinets.
about.timeline.2015.title: Entered Smart Vending Industry
about.timeline.2015.description: Entered the smart vending machine industry and began our exploration in the R&D and manufacturing of intelligent terminal equipment.
about.timeline.2018.title: Document Management Cabinets
about.timeline.2018.description: Expanded our business and launched document management cabinets, extending our product applications from retail scenarios to enterprise asset and document management.
about.timeline.2024.title: 600+ Partners Worldwide
about.timeline.2024.description: Our number of partners increased to 600+, reflecting continuous growth in service capability and market recognition.
about.timeline.2026.title: Global Reach 60+ Countries
about.timeline.2026.description: Customized projects continue to grow, and our products have been exported to 60+ countries and regions, providing flexible and efficient smart cabinet solutions for customers across different industries.
about.timeline.intro: Since 2015, we have started from smart vending machines and continued to develop intelligent terminal equipment and enterprise material management solutions. Over the years, we have built a product system covering smart cabinets for tools, CNC tools, documents, consumables, spare parts, and other materials, while providing customized solutions for customers worldwide.

home.solutions.subtitle: Secure storage, automated dispensing, return tracking and real-time inventory control for manufacturing plants, machine shops, warehouses and laboratories.
solutions.items.cabinet-type.desc: Automated dispensing cabinets for tools, PPE, spare parts and MRO supplies. Provide 24/7 employee access while tracking every pickup record.
solutions.items.managed-items.desc: Manage carbide inserts, end mills, drills, taps, tool holders and gauges with secure issuing, return tracking and low-stock alerts.
solutions.items.industry.desc: Control safety gloves, masks, goggles, earplugs, respirators and other PPE with employee permissions and usage reports.
solutions.items.custom-solution.desc: Track fasteners, grinding discs, batteries, labels, spare parts and maintenance consumables with real-time stock and replenishment alerts.
solutions.items.robots.desc: Use RFID smart cabinets to identify, issue, return and track high-value tools, reusable assets and equipment with full traceability.
solutions.items.laboratory.desc: Store chemical bottles, reagents, samples and lab consumables with secure access, usage records and optional cooling for temperature-sensitive liquids.
solutions.items.cleanroom.desc: Manage electronic components, semiconductor parts, optical parts and cleanroom supplies with ESD-safe storage and traceable access records.
solutions.items.other.desc: Customize locker sizes, drawer layouts, weighing modules, RFID functions, software workflows and cabinet combinations for your factory.

notifications.title: WeChat Notifications
notifications.enableDesc: Send notifications via Enterprise WeChat group bot when new contact messages are received
notifications.webhookHelp: Get the Webhook URL by adding a bot to your Enterprise WeChat group
notifications.testSuccess: Test notification sent successfully! Check your WeChat group.
notifications.testError: Failed to send test notification. Please check the webhook URL.
notifications.help1: 1. Create a group chat in Enterprise WeChat
notifications.help2: 2. Go to Group Settings → Group Bot → Add Bot
notifications.help3: 3. Set bot name and avatar, copy the Webhook URL
notifications.help4: 4. Paste the Webhook URL into the input field above
notifications.help5: 5. Click "Test Send" to verify the configuration
notifications.help6: 6. After saving, notifications will be sent automatically when new contact messages are received
about.companyIntro.title: Who We Are
about.companyIntro.paragraph1: We are a professional smart material cabinet manufacturer in China, specializing in industrial vending machines and automated inventory management solutions. With 11 years of experience, we help factories control tools, spare parts, PPE, fasteners, consumables, documents and other MRO supplies more efficiently.
about.companyIntro.paragraph2: Our smart cabinets are widely used in CNC machining, automotive manufacturing, electronics, mold making, metal fabrication, medical equipment, new materials and smart factory applications. By combining access control, real-time inventory tracking, low-stock alerts and usage reports, our solutions help customers reduce material waste, avoid production downtime and improve inventory visibility.
about.painPoints.title: Customer Pain Points
about.painPoints.subtitle: Common material management challenges in factories
about.painPoints.item1.title: Unclear Material Usage Records
about.painPoints.item1.desc: Factories often rely on paper forms, Excel files or manual tool rooms to record material usage. It is difficult to know who took the item, when it was taken and which department used it.
about.painPoints.item2.title: Frequent Stockouts During Production
about.painPoints.item2.desc: CNC tools, PPE, fasteners, spare parts and MRO consumables are used every day. Without real-time inventory tracking, missing materials may cause production delays or machine downtime.
about.painPoints.item3.title: High Tool and Consumable Waste
about.painPoints.item3.desc: Cutting tools, gloves, grinding wheels, screws and other consumables are often taken without control. Over time, small items can become a large hidden cost.
about.painPoints.item4.title: Difficult Return Management
about.painPoints.item4.desc: Reusable tools, gauges, fixtures, documents and special items may not be returned on time, or may be returned to the wrong place. This makes asset tracking difficult.
about.painPoints.item5.title: Manual Inventory Takes Too Much Time
about.painPoints.item5.desc: Warehouse staff and tool room managers spend a lot of time checking stock, issuing items, making records and preparing replenishment lists.
about.painPoints.item6.title: Lack of Data for Cost Analysis
about.painPoints.item6.desc: Many factories cannot clearly analyze material usage by employee, department, machine, project or production line, making cost control difficult.
about.solutions.title: Our Solutions
about.solutions.subtitle: How our smart cabinets solve these challenges
about.solutions.item1.title: Smart Access Control
about.solutions.item1.desc: Our smart cabinets support IC card, PIN code, face recognition, QR code and fingerprint access. Only authorized employees can pick up specific materials.
about.solutions.item2.title: Real-Time Inventory Tracking
about.solutions.item2.desc: Every pickup, return and replenishment is automatically recorded. Managers can view stock levels and material usage data in real time.
about.solutions.item3.title: Low-Stock Alerts
about.solutions.item3.desc: The system can send automatic low-stock alerts before key materials run out, helping factories avoid emergency purchasing and production downtime.
about.solutions.item4.title: Controlled Dispensing and Return Management
about.solutions.item4.desc: Smart cabinets can manage issuing, returning and old item collection for CNC tools, reusable tools, gauges, documents and other important materials.
about.solutions.item5.title: Inventory Reports and Cost Control
about.solutions.item5.desc: Usage reports can be generated by employee, department, machine, project or item category, helping factories reduce waste and improve purchasing decisions.
about.solutions.item6.title: Flexible Cabinet Solutions
about.solutions.item6.desc: We provide CNC tool vending machines, smart locker cabinets, drawer cabinets, weighing cabinets, RFID cabinets, micro warehousing cabinets and customized smart material cabinets for different factory needs.
about.solutions.item7.title: System Integration Available
about.solutions.item7.desc: Our software can support ERP, MES, SAP and other factory management systems, helping customers connect material data with production and purchasing workflows.
about.solutions.item8.title: Cloud Platform & Remote Oversight
about.solutions.item8.desc: Our cloud dashboard lets managers monitor inventory, usage and alerts across multiple sites in real time, enabling remote management from any device.
about.advantages.title: Our Advantages
about.advantages.item1.title: 11 Years of Smart Cabinet Manufacturing Experience
about.advantages.item1.desc: Over a decade of dedicated R&D and production of CNC tool smart cabinets, delivering reliable solutions to factories worldwide.
about.advantages.item2.title: Factory Direct Price, About 10% Lower Than Market Average
about.advantages.item2.desc: Direct-from-factory pricing with no middlemen, saving customers up to 10% compared with market averages.
about.advantages.item3.title: Custom CNC Tool, PPE and MRO Cabinet Solutions
about.advantages.item3.desc: Tailored cabinet designs adapted to your factory's materials, workflow and space for the best fit.
about.advantages.item4.title: ERP, MES and SAP Integration Available
about.advantages.item4.desc: Seamless integration with ERP, MES and SAP systems to connect material data with production and purchasing.
about.advantages.item5.title: Real-Time Inventory Tracking and Low-Stock Alerts
about.advantages.item5.desc: Real-time inventory visibility with low-stock alerts and usage reports that reduce waste and downtime.
about.advantages.item6.title: After-Sales Support and Technical Service
about.advantages.item6.desc: Professional installation guidance, training and remote technical support to keep your system running smoothly.
about.whyChoose.title: Why Choose Us
about.whyChoose.subtitle: Eight reasons factories trust our smart cabinets
about.whyChoose.item1.title: 11 Years of Industry Experience
about.whyChoose.item1.desc: We have 11 years of experience in manufacturing smart material cabinets and industrial vending machines for factories, workshops and warehouses.
about.whyChoose.item2.title: Factory Direct Price
about.whyChoose.item2.desc: As a direct manufacturer, we offer competitive factory pricing, helping customers save about 10% compared with many market solutions.
about.whyChoose.item3.title: Customized Material Management Solutions
about.whyChoose.item3.desc: We provide custom smart cabinets for CNC tools, PPE, MRO supplies, spare parts, fasteners, documents, employee storage and special materials.
about.whyChoose.item4.title: Multiple Cabinet Types Available
about.whyChoose.item4.desc: Our product range includes CNC tool vending machines, smart locker cabinets, drawer cabinets, weighing cabinets, RFID cabinets, micro warehousing cabinets and modular vending systems.
about.whyChoose.item5.title: ERP, MES and SAP Integration
about.whyChoose.item5.desc: Our smart cabinet software can connect with ERP, MES, SAP and other factory systems to support digital inventory management.
about.whyChoose.item6.title: Real-Time Inventory Tracking
about.whyChoose.item6.desc: Every pickup, return and replenishment can be recorded. The system supports stock alerts, usage reports and material consumption analysis.
about.whyChoose.item7.title: Reliable After-Sales Support
about.whyChoose.item7.desc: We provide installation guidance, software training, remote technical support and after-sales service to help customers run the system smoothly.
about.whyChoose.item8.title: Fast Delivery & Global Logistics
about.whyChoose.item8.desc: With efficient production and a mature logistics network, we deliver standard and customized cabinets to customers in 60+ countries quickly and reliably.
